method.operation: timer query wrapped around WebGLRenderer.render(scene, camera)
method.warmup: one preceding 30-sample run before the retained measurements

environment.browser: hardware-backed Chromium in the Codex in-app browser
environment.renderer: ANGLE (Intel, Intel(R) UHD Graphics (0x0000A78B) Direct3D11 vs_5_0 ps_5_0, D3D11)

limitations: This is one Windows integrated-GPU environment, not a broad hardware guarantee.
The measurement includes the continuous exact-grid region boundaries and closes the unknown-GPU-time evidence gap.
The production candidate remains default-off; the measurement does not itself activate or authorize route cutover.
